teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Mariners win 3-2 against St. Louis Cardinals on April 26
Jose A. Ferrer earns final out in latest victory
Mariners continue road trip through National League Central

last_game.highlights: Jose A. Ferrer closed out the game for the save, securing a narrow 3-2 victory on the road

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks
headlines: Seahawks finalize 2026 NFL Draft class with 8 selections
Team selects RB Jadarian Price (Notre Dame) in Round 1 at No. 32 overall
Draft class includes 3 offensive players and 5 defensive players
John Schneider made trades to acquire more picks including Beau Stephens in Round 5

last_game.highlights: 2026 NFL Draft completed April 23-25. Seahawks made 8 total selections after entering with only 4 picks. Notable picks: RB Jadarian Price (R1), S Bud Clark (R2), CB Julian Neal (R3)

teams.name: Seattle Kraken
headlines: Kraken eliminated from playoff contention for 3rd consecutive season
Elimination confirmed April 11, 2026 after Kings defeated Oilers
Team has not qualified for postseason since 2022-23 Western Conference semifinal run
Penalty kill struggles among factors in missing playoffs

last_game.highlights: 2025-26 regular season has concluded. Kraken finished outside playoff picture for third straight year.

teams.name: Seattle Sounders FC
headlines: Sounders defeat FC Dallas 2-1 at Lumen Field on April 25
Jordan Morris named to MLS Team of the Matchday for Matchday 10
Morris contributed goal and assist in victory over Dallas
Sounders record improves to 6-1-1 (19 points) on the season

last_game.highlights: Jordan Morris with a goal and assist, named to MLS Team of the Matchday. Jesús Ferreira opened scoring. Sounders improved to 6-1-1 on the season.
